response.global_analysis: The video features a spoken monologue from Kureiji Ollie. While background music is present, there is no vocal singing. I am transcribing the spoken audio, using the hardcoded Japanese subtitles as the original language (og) reference and the spoken English as the English translation (en). Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio. I have split long lines into smaller segments (under 50 chars) and ensured semantic continuity across splits, adhering to contiguous timestamping where no pause exists.

subtitles.original: Crazy になるほど 恋している ZOMBIE
subtitles.english: Crazy to the Point of Loving You ZOMBIE

subtitles.original: 3Dライブを見てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to watch the 3D Live!

subtitles.original: オーリーの愛、ちゃんと届いたかな？
subtitles.english: How was it? Did you feel my love?

subtitles.original: そう！特別に用意したお部屋、可愛かったでしょ？
subtitles.english: Oh, look at that! A specially prepared bedroom!

subtitles.original: ベッドやソファ、それにウディンもいたし...
subtitles.english: It has a bed, a sofa, Udin, and...

subtitles.original: オーリーが大事にしてる人たちの写真も
subtitles.english: And I don't know if you noticed, but there was...

subtitles.original: 飾ってあったんだよー！
subtitles.english: ...a display photo of my most cherished people.

subtitles.original: ネオンステージもかっこよかったでしょ！
subtitles.english: I think the neon stage was really cool too!

subtitles.original: テレビがいっぱい並んでたの、見た？
subtitles.english: You probably spotted a bunch of TVs around.

subtitles.original: あれね、オーリーが君のことを遠くから見られるように置いてあったんだよ～
subtitles.english: They're there so I can watch you from afar.

subtitles.original: すごいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Cool, right?

subtitles.original: あ...でも、何回も連れ回しちゃったね
subtitles.english: Uh, but I really did drag you around, huh?

subtitles.original: 大丈夫？疲れてない？
subtitles.english: Um, how are you? Do you feel sick? Are you okay?

subtitles.original: あ...まあ、寝てる間に運んだから、問題ないかなって思ってるけど...
subtitles.english: I carried you while you slept, so it's fine...

subtitles.original: あ！そういえば！
subtitles.english: Huh? What? No, nothing! I didn't say anything!

subtitles.original: なんか途中で怖がって逃げたり、避けたりしてたでしょ～？
subtitles.english: Speaking of you, you kept hiding from me!

subtitles.original: ふふ、悪い子なんだから～！
subtitles.english: Naughty, naughty! Tsk, tsk!

subtitles.original: いつもコメントしたり、いいねしてくれたり、
subtitles.english: You always leave comments and like my posts,

subtitles.original: 会いに来てくれてたんだけど
subtitles.english: so I thought you'd like it if I visited!

subtitles.original: そんなに驚かせちゃうとは思わなかったよ
subtitles.english: I didn't think it would surprise you that much.

subtitles.original: 急に目の前に現れたから、びっくりしすぎちゃったのかな？？
subtitles.english: Maybe you were too surprised when I appeared?

subtitles.original: うん、ふーん...
subtitles.english: Yeah, hmm...

subtitles.original: オーリーはね、君のためにたくさん頑張ったんだよ～
subtitles.english: But just so you know, I worked hard for you!

subtitles.original: 衣装を何度も着替えたり、歌の練習もたくさんしたの！
subtitles.english: I sang a lot and changed outfits many times!

subtitles.original: オーリーの愛、ちゃんと届いたかな？
subtitles.english: And I wonder if my feelings reached you?

subtitles.original: ...届いたよね？？
subtitles.english: It obviously did, right?

subtitles.original: 最後は、やっと君を捕まえちゃった！
subtitles.english: Also, at the end, I finally managed to catch you!

subtitles.original: それって君も望んでたんでしょ？？
subtitles.english: That's what you hoped for, right?

subtitles.original: だってずっと逃げてたんだもん！
subtitles.english: I mean, 'cause you were running away from me

subtitles.original: オーリーのことが大好きだから、そうなっちゃうって分かってたんだよ？ね？
subtitles.english: because you love me! You expected it too, right?

subtitles.original: うんうん！やっぱりそうだよね！
subtitles.english: Hehe, period!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、まだ見てくれてるみんなに
subtitles.english: Anyway, for those of you who are still watching,

subtitles.original: お知らせだよー！
subtitles.english: thank you by the way. I have an announcement!

subtitles.original: SO87の新曲「Love Me Back」に出演して、
subtitles.english: I'll be featured in SO87's song 'Love Me Back'

subtitles.original: なんとMVにも出ちゃいます！
subtitles.english: with the music video!

subtitles.original: すごーくかっこいいから、みんなちゃんとチェックしてね～！
subtitles.english: It's going to be cool, so keep an eye out!

subtitles.original: ワクワクするでしょ～？
subtitles.english: Ah, it's just so exciting, isn't it?

subtitles.original: もしまたオーリーの「愛」を感じたくなったら
subtitles.english: If you ever feel the need to feel my love again,

subtitles.original: いつでも3D生配信を見に来てね！
subtitles.english: come back to watch the 3D Birthday Live!

subtitles.original: オーリーはずーっとここで待ってるんだからね～！
subtitles.english: Ollie will always be here, waiting for you!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: オックレイジー！
subtitles.english: Otsucrazy!
